scripts.format: turbo run format --filter=./apps/* --filter=./packages/* && bun run format:root
scripts.format:check: turbo run format:check --filter=./apps/* --filter=./packages/* && bun run format:check:root
scripts.format:root: prettier --write AGENTS.md README.md package.json turbo.json tsconfig.base.json .prettierrc.json .github/workflows/*.yml
scripts.format:check:root: prettier --check AGENTS.md README.md package.json turbo.json tsconfig.base.json .prettierrc.json .github/workflows/*.yml
scripts.ci: turbo run lint typecheck format:check --filter=./apps/* --filter=./packages/* && bun run format:check:root
scripts.ci:mobile: turbo run lint typecheck format:check --filter=seen... && bun run format:check:root
scripts.ci:api: turbo run lint typecheck format:check --filter=@seen/api... && bun run format:check:root
